items.scenario: You ordered a wireless keyboard from an online store two weeks ago, but the package that arrived contained a phone case instead. The store has a customer support address listed on its website, and you want the correct item shipped soon.
items.direction: Write an email to the customer support manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe what you ordered and what arrived
Ask how the correct item can be sent to you
Request a refund of the return shipping cost
items.subject: Wrong item received in my order

items.scenario: You have been renting an apartment for six months, and the kitchen sink has started leaking under the cabinet. Water is now collecting on the floor each evening, and you reported it once last week with no reply.
items.direction: Write an email to the property manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain when the leak began and how it has worsened
Ask that a plumber be sent this week
Suggest a time you would be home for the repair
items.subject: Leaking sink in apartment 4B

items.scenario: You volunteer at a local library that has just announced shorter weekend hours. Several students who study there on Saturdays have told you they can no longer use the reading room, and you want to share their concerns with the head librarian.
items.direction: Write an email to the head librarian. In your email, do the following:
goals: Tell her how students have reacted to the new hours
Explain why weekend access matters to local students
Suggest keeping the reading room open later on Saturdays
items.subject: Concerns about the new weekend hours

items.scenario: You and a friend planned a weekend hiking trip for this Saturday, but the forecast now predicts heavy rain all day. You would rather move the trip to the following weekend and visit a different trail that you read about recently.
items.direction: Write an email to your friend. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why Saturday no longer works for the hike
Suggest moving the trip to the next weekend
Describe the new trail you would like to try
items.subject: Changing our hiking plans
